в•°в”ҲвһӨ In case the bot's description is too, ensure that you adjust your API's context size to 4097 tokens. If the bot is voicing your thoughts, talking for you or just roleplaying for you, please be aware that it's not my responsibility; this could be due to your jailbreak or main prompt. My botвҖҷs are better when used with OpenAI, you may experience errors with other apiвҖҷs or not be able to talk to them at all. Please leave feedback with actual comments if possible!
